description: Jump and fly your way through danger in this rhythm-based action platformer!

v1.0.0-alpha.1.description:
Changelogs in changelogs.md 
APWorld source code - https://github.com/matorblal-byte/APWorldForGDArch/tree/main/worlds
APCpp-gd source code - https://github.com/matorblal-byte/APCpp-gd
Source code in in this repo if that wasnt clear already
Please report bugs thank you! 
Planning to add modifers for the levels for replayability (i.e 1.25x speed)
Planning to add the whole reboot thing and new save file thing and stuffs
Planning to add portal checks and stuff (it works, but i havent put it in due to there being more items then locations and almost every level would be impossible with it (will probably have a solution by when i fix the more itemds than locations thing)
Planning to add room info after connected and disconnect button
Preparing to add progressive gauntlets and or map packs 
## Things to consider
Current release include debug buttons ignore them click the silver one
Could softlock - If you beat all the levels that give 100 mana orbs, you will not be able to progress (because 100 mana orbs ends the path) (99% of this would happen solo)
If there is a save file loaded, notifications will get spammed
~~Tower levels except the tower don't give items on completion for some reason~~ they do now!
No win state (so you might wanna release manually when you want)
Deathlink is untested
Multiworld is partially untested (i only tested with 1 yaml)(literally the most important thing but im confident)
MacOS and Linux untested (what i mean by this is with wine and other stuffs that left you run windows applications)
## How to import
Get geode (i assume you have it)
Download both files, run the apworld to install it 
Drag the .geode into the mods folder (Right click in GD and press open local files, geode, mods, then drag it) 
On the arch client, generate template options, options creator, generate, then host it (can't host on archipelago.gg) 
Connect to Archipelago with the top right button when you go into GD! 
Should now be in (if you havent port forwarded, use a loopback address (127.0.01) and use your port number, which you have to disable private firewall?)
v1.0.0-alpha.1.title: v1.0.0-alpha.1

v1.0.0-alpha.10.description:
Bugfix 7 (vector) update!
Changelogs in [changelogs.md](https://github.com/matorblal-byte/ArchipelagoGD2/blob/main/changelog.md)

Preparing to add progressive gauntlets and or map packs 
## Things to consider
**Backup your save data before going into archipelago mode to be safe!!**
Speed modifers weights are a little flawed 2.5x is like 1.4x for some reason whoops
Current release include debug buttons ignore them click the silver one
Could softlock - APWorld generation could make it impossible
Deathlink is untested
MacOS untested (what i mean by this is with wine and other stuffs that left you run windows applications)
If you disable the coins checkbox, it'll also disable randomized portals 
## How to import
Get geode (i assume you have it)
Download both files, run the apworld to install it 
Drag the .geode into the mods folder (Right click in GD and press open local files, geode, mods, then drag it) 
On the arch client, generate template options, options creator, generate, then host it
Connect to Archipelago with the top right button when you go into GD! 
Should now be in

v1.0.0-alpha.12-pr.description:
Making a prerelease for an Alpha is Crazy (before i do some testing)
- Revamp APWorld (fixes unknown location Finally)
- Fix crash by reentering the shop once you bought an item
- Reduce shop items price
Upgrade to archipelago v0.6.7
